notes: stdout multipart inline patch series output matches stock Git after normalizing version-derived MIME boundaries
revision positional surface selects the two-commit range and emits stock-compatible multipart inline patch output
inline patch series output matches stock Git after normalizing version-derived MIME boundaries
custom subject prefix output matches stock Git after normalizing version-derived MIME boundaries
cover-letter series output matches stock Git after normalizing version-derived MIME boundaries
numbered cover-letter series output matches stock Git after normalizing version-derived MIME boundaries
merge commit first-parent patch stdout and exit status match stock Git
output directory mode writes the expected patch filenames, prints stock path lines and produces patches applicable to the expected final tree
no-numbered stdout series uses unnumbered PATCH subjects and omits numbered subject markers like stock Git
attach stdout series matches stock Git after normalizing version-derived MIME boundaries
numbered stdout series matches stock Git after normalizing version-derived trailers
long output-directory form prints stock paths and writes stock-equivalent patch files after normalizing version-derived trailers
numbered-files form has output and side-effect gaps: stock Git prints and writes numeric files out/1 and out/2 while Zmin currently uses subject filenames with .patch suffix
custom suffix form has output and side-effect gaps: stock Git prints and writes .mbox files while Zmin currently keeps the default .patch suffix
